header.title: Featured Projects
header.description: A collection of aerospace engineering projects showcasing expertise in structural analysis, propulsion, computational simulation, and intelligent system design.

projects.title: Digital Twin of an Aircraft Wing
projects.description: Developed a real-time digital twin integrating sensor data, FEA, CFD, and live structural health monitoring.

projects.title: Pintle Injector Flow Analysis
projects.description: Performed CFD simulations to evaluate the effect of varying pintle gaps on injector flow characteristics and mixing.

projects.title: Cold Flow Analysis of a Convergent-Divergent Nozzle
projects.description: Analyzed compressible flow behavior through a rocket nozzle using numerical simulations and theoretical validation.

projects.title: Supersonic Private Jet Concept
projects.description: Designed a Mach 2.5 business jet by integrating aerodynamic performance, propulsion selection, and mission analysis.

projects.title: Solid Rocket Motor Performance Analysis
projects.description: Predicted rocket motor performance using NASA CEA and propulsion design methodologies.

projects.title: Miniature Auto-Throttle & Thrust Reversal System
projects.description: Designed and built a prototype thrust management system using Arduino, sensors, and custom mechanical components.

projects.title: Parachute Design & Recovery System
projects.description: Designed a recovery parachute to achieve controlled descent through aerodynamic sizing and performance analysis.

projects.title: Preliminary Rocket Design
projects.description: Designed a high-power rocket for a 1 km mission using CAD modeling, stability analysis, and trajectory simulation.
